mapper.sql: cs.id, cs.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, cs.teacher_id, u.real_name as teacher_name, cs.subject, cs.day_of_week, cs.period, cs.classroom, cs.start_date, cs.end_date, cs.create_time, cs.update_time, cs.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON cs.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cs.teacher_id = u.id WHERE cs.class_id = #{classId} AND cs.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cs.day_of_week ASC, cs.period ASC
SELECT FROM course_schedule cs LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON cs.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cs.teacher_id = u.id WHERE cs.id = #{id} AND cs.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_schedule ( class_id, teacher_id, subject, day_of_week, period, classroom, start_date, end_date, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{classId}, #{teacherId}, #{subject}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{period}, #{classroom}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE course_schedule
class_id = #{classId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, subject = #{subject}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, period = #{period}, classroom = #{classroom}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE course_schedule SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
